regimeSub: FOMC minutes reveal split Fed as Warsh holds fire; OPEC+ output normalizes oil while sticky 4.2% CPI persists.
themes: July 8 FOMC minutes show Fed officials split on rate direction with inflation concerns growing at June meeting → market pricing hold but Warsh retains optionality for September
OPEC+ Jul 6 output expansion pushes Brent to $78.89 (pre-Iran war levels) → energy CPI tailwind fading but May core PCE at 3.4% keeps real policy restrictive bias intact
BOJ at 1% ending tapering FY2027 fails to arrest USDJPY at 162.47 → Japan negative real rates vs US 4.2% CPI keeps carry bid; gold at $4080 reflects inflation hedge demand
KOSPI 7359 stabilizing as SK Hynix HBM momentum persists but KRW at 1506 → BOK Jul 16 hike speculation remains live on Fed divergence risk

signalNotes.name: US Real Rate
signalNotes.note: Policy rate 3.63% vs 4.2% CPI = -57bp real; Fed minutes show officials worried inflation above target persists

signalNotes.name: 2s10s Curve
signalNotes.note: 2Y 4.19% / 10Y 4.55% = +36bp steepener; term premium reflects fiscal concerns and inflation uncertainty

signalNotes.name: HY Credit Spread
signalNotes.note: VIX 16.9 signals benign risk appetite; credit markets shrugging off stagflation concerns for now

signalNotes.name: VIX
signalNotes.note: At 16.9 subdued despite FOMC split; equity vol complacent ahead of July 29-30 meeting

signalNotes.name: Brent Crude
signalNotes.note: Brent $78.89 post OPEC+ expansion normalizing to pre-Iran war levels; energy squeeze easing

signalNotes.name: Gold
signalNotes.note: Gold $4080 bid as inflation hedge despite July worst monthly drop since 2008; real rate support intact

signalNotes.name: USD / KRW
signalNotes.note: KRW at 1506 marginally firmer; BOK Jul 16 hike speculation rising on Warsh divergence signals

signalNotes.name: Semiconductor SOX
signalNotes.note: AI chip rebound flagged Jul 6; SK Hynix HBM4E momentum keeps KOSPI 7359 supported despite FX outflows

headline: FOMC minutes expose Fed split on rates as Warsh navigates stagflation trap: 4.2% CPI sticky, June NFP 57K miss, OPEC+ output normalizing oil while markets await July decision.
